exercises.description: Stand with feet about shoulder-width apart, sit your hips back and down, then stand back up with control.
Lower into a squat and perform small controlled up-and-down pulses while staying low.
Lower into a squat and hold the position with your chest up and knees tracking over your feet.
Perform a squat, then explode upward into a jump and land softly before repeating.
Take a wider stance with toes turned slightly out, lower into a squat, and return to standing.
Stay in a partial squat and step side to side while keeping tension in the legs.
Step forward, lower both knees, then push back to the starting position.
Step one leg back, lower into a lunge, then return to standing.
Alternate forward or reverse lunges from side to side in a steady rhythm.
Step out to the side, sit into one hip, then push back to center.
Step one leg diagonally behind the other, lower into a lunge, then return to standing.
Move forward one lunge at a time, alternating legs as you travel.
Take a staggered stance, lower straight down, and rise without stepping between reps.
Place rear foot on a low surface if available, lower into a split squat, and rise back up.
Leap side to side from one foot to the other while swinging the opposite leg behind.
Balance on one leg, hinge at the hips, reach toward the floor, and stand back up.
Rise onto the balls of your feet, pause, and lower with control.
Lean against a wall with knees bent and hold a seated position.
Lie on your back with knees bent, drive hips upward, then lower down.
Perform a glute bridge while keeping one leg lifted off the floor.
With upper back supported on the floor, squeeze glutes to lift hips up and down.
From hands and knees, drive one heel upward while keeping the knee bent.
From hands and knees, lift one knee out to the side and lower it back down.
Lie on your back with soles of feet together, knees out, and thrust hips upward.
From a plank, lower your chest toward the floor and press back up.
Perform a push-up from the knees while keeping the body in a straight line from head to knees.
Place hands on an elevated surface, lower your chest, and press back up.
Place feet on an elevated surface, lower your chest, and press back up.
Set hands wider than shoulder-width and perform a push-up.
Place hands close together under the chest and perform a push-up.
Start with hips lifted high, lower head toward the floor, then press back up.
Alternate between forearm plank and high plank while keeping hips steady.
Move forward on hands and feet with knees hovering close to the floor.
Face upward, lift hips, and walk on hands and feet.
From a plank, rapidly drive knees toward the chest one at a time.
From a plank, drive each knee toward the opposite elbow.
Squat down, kick feet back, return forward, and jump up.
exercises.muscles: Full body; chest; legs; shoulders; core; cardio

exercises.description: Squat down, jump or step back to plank, return forward, and stand without the jump.
Hold a straight-body position on forearms or hands while bracing the midsection.
From a high plank, tap one shoulder with the opposite hand while resisting rotation.
Support your body on one forearm and the side of one foot while holding a straight line.
From a side plank, lower the hips slightly and lift them back up.
From a plank, reach one arm forward briefly while keeping hips stable.
Lie on your back and slowly extend opposite arm and leg while bracing your core.
From hands and knees, extend opposite arm and leg, then return with control.
Lie on your back and lift shoulders off the floor using your abs.
Lift knees toward the chest and curl hips off the floor.
Alternate elbow-to-knee crunches while extending the opposite leg.
Lift legs and torso at the same time to meet in the middle, then lower.
Lie on your back with legs up and reach hands toward your toes.
Lie on your back with knees bent and tap each heel side to side.
Sit slightly reclined and rotate torso side to side.
Lie on your back and hold shoulders and legs slightly off the floor.
Lie on your back and alternate small up-and-down leg kicks while bracing the core.
Lie on your back and alternate crossing straight legs over each other.
Lie face down and lift arms, chest, and legs off the floor.
Lie face down and lift arms into Y, T, and W positions with control.
exercises.muscles: Upper back; rear shoulders; posture muscles

exercises.description: Jump feet out while raising arms overhead, then return to start.
Run in place while driving knees upward quickly.
Jog in place while kicking heels toward the glutes.
Jump vertically and pull knees up toward the chest before landing softly.
Hinge forward to place your hands on the floor, walk them out to a plank, then walk them back and stand tall.
Hover your knees a few inches off the floor on hands and feet while keeping your back flat and core braced.
From a beast position, briefly reach one hand forward without letting your hips twist.
From a beast position, tap one shoulder with the opposite hand while staying stable through the trunk.
From a hands-and-feet hover, rotate your body and thread one leg through until it extends out to the side, then return.
From a tabletop hover, pivot and kick one leg across your body while lifting the opposite hand.
Hold a hovering bear plank and tap one knee lightly to the floor at a time with control.
Jump your feet apart and together while swinging your arms straight out in front and back to the sides.
Start in a split stance, jump explosively, and switch legs in the air before landing softly.
Swing your arms and jump forward as far as you can, then reset with a controlled landing.
Push off one foot and jump sideways to the other, landing softly and absorbing the impact.
Skip forward or in place with an exaggerated knee drive and explosive upward push from the ground.
Stay low and rapidly shuffle your feet in place while pumping your arms.
Hop side to side while driving one knee up and swinging your arms like a running back cut.
Jump both feet side to side together in a quick rhythm while staying light on the ground.
Drop low with hands near the floor, then explode forward or upward into a powerful jump.
Jump vertically and rotate your body 180 degrees in the air before landing under control.
Rise tall, then quickly drop into an athletic quarter squat and stick the landing position.
Place your hands behind your head, hinge at the hips with a flat back, and stand back up.
From a bridge position, slowly step your heels away from your body and back in while keeping hips lifted.
Support yourself on your hands and heels with your chest up and hold your body in a straight line.
From a reverse plank, lift one straight leg at a time without letting your hips sag.
Hold a hollow body shape and gently rock forward and back without losing tension.
Lie face down and lift your chest, arms, and legs slightly off the floor while holding tension.
Lie face down and alternate lifting opposite arm and leg in a smooth fluttering motion.
exercises.muscles: Lower back; glutes; shoulders; upper back

exercises.description: Lie face down and sweep your arms from overhead to your sides while keeping them off the floor.
exercises.muscles: Upper back; rear shoulders; lower back

exercises.description: Bring one knee up toward the same-side elbow in a standing crunch, then switch sides.
Drive one knee up toward the opposite elbow while rotating through your torso, then alternate.
Drive one knee up sharply at a time while staying tall and moving at a quick cadence.
Kick one leg straight out in front at a time while keeping your chest lifted and core tight.
exercises.muscles: Quads; hip flexors; core; balance muscles

exercises.description: Lift and extend one leg out to the side with control, then repeat and switch sides.
From a downward dog position, reach one hand back to tap the opposite foot and alternate sides.
Flow from downward dog into a knee drive toward your chest or nose, then return and alternate.
Sit in a reverse tabletop and alternate lifting one hand to tap the opposite foot.
From a tabletop position, lift your hips and reach one arm overhead while staying stable through the shoulders.
From a crab position, lift your hips and reach one hand to the opposite foot, then alternate sides.
Lie on one side and lift the top leg straight up and down with control.
Lie on your side and lift the bottom leg upward to target the inner thigh.
Stay low and shuffle quickly side to side for short bursts while keeping your feet active.
Move laterally with a fast grapevine step pattern while rotating through the hips.
Flow from a pike position forward into an arched chest-up position, then press back to the start.
Lower your head and chest in a swooping path under an imaginary bar, then reverse the motion back.
Lower fully to the floor, briefly lift your hands, then press back up with control.
Lean your shoulders forward past your hands and perform a push-up while keeping the body rigid.
Hold a high plank and move only through the shoulder blades by sinking and pressing the chest away from the floor.
Start on forearms in a pike, shift your head forward, then press back through the shoulders.
From a forearm pike, rock your body forward and back while keeping hips lifted and shoulders active.
Walk your feet up a wall and your hands closer in, then return with control.
Kick or walk into a wall-supported handstand and hold a stacked position while bracing the midline.
In a wall-supported handstand, briefly tap one shoulder at a time while resisting sway.
Perform a push-up and rotate into a side plank with one arm reaching upward before switching sides.
As you lower into a push-up, drive one knee toward the same-side elbow and alternate sides.
Place one hand slightly higher than the other, perform push-ups, then switch hand positions.
Push more through one arm while the other extends wider to the side, then alternate.
From a crab position, lift hips and reach one arm overhead across the body, then alternate sides.
Hold a crab position and alternate bringing one knee toward the opposite hand.
Lift into a reverse tabletop and alternate raising one foot at a time without dropping the hips.
In reverse tabletop, shift your weight side to side to load one arm at a time.
From a beast hover, reach one hand back toward the opposite foot and alternate sides.
Hover in beast and drive one elbow back as if rowing while stabilizing through the other arm.
Move forward using only your hands while keeping legs mostly passive behind you.
Travel sideways using your hands while keeping your torso low and legs following behind.
Lie face down and lift your chest while pulling your elbows back and squeezing the upper back.
exercises.muscles: Rear shoulders; upper back; lower back

exercises.description: From hands and knees, gently rock your weight forward and back to load the wrists and forearms.
Jump from one foot to the other while kicking the opposite leg forward at hip height.
Do a jumping-jack motion, dropping into a squat as your feet open and your arms come down.
Balance on one leg and drive the opposite knee upward to meet your hands at waist level before switching sides.
Explode upward from a squat and drive your knees toward waist height while bringing your hands down to meet them.
Jump in a four-point rotation while staying low, completing a full turn back to the front as one rep.
Drop to the floor, jump your legs back to plank, spring your feet forward, and explode upward to standing.
exercises.muscles: Full body; chest; legs; shoulders; core

exercises.description: Perform push-ups while jumping your feet apart on the way down and back together on the way up.
From a forearm plank, drive your knees toward the same-side shoulder while alternating sides and keeping hips low.
Run a few steps side to side and squat to touch the floor at each end.
Sprint in a wide stance, rotate through directions, shuffle laterally, then drop low and reset into a sprint.
Start low with hands near the floor, then jump powerfully as if shooting a basketball and repeat.
Drop down, do a short set of push-ups and floor runs, then jump back up to standing.
From plank, jump both feet toward one shoulder, return to center, and alternate sides.
From plank, jump both feet in between your hands and then back out to plank.
Stay in a low athletic stance and alternate straight punches from left to right.
Jump your feet from a wide side stance to a front-back stance while coordinating single-arm jack motions.
Stay low in a wide stance and alternate upward punching motions with power.
Hold a low squat-like stance and fire rapid open-hand punches forward.
Step side to side while kicking the opposite leg forward with your hands at your hips.
Jump side to side, reach high in the air, then bend down to touch the floor between your legs as you land.
Support yourself on your hands and feet and bend your elbows to dip your body up and down.

exercises.exercise: Triceps Dips with One Leg Up
exercises.description: Perform triceps dips while keeping one leg raised, then switch sides.
From an inverted V, roll forward with a rounded back and perform a tight triceps-focused push-up.
Run in place briefly and then hop sideways over an imaginary hurdle, repeating back and forth.
Step sideways as you lower and raise through each push-up, then travel in the other direction.
Alternate quick low squat hops with a drop to plank for a standard push-up on cue.
exercises.muscles: Full body; chest; legs; shoulders; core

exercises.description: Hold plank, lift one leg, and pulse it up and down before switching sides.
Hold a wide downward-dog position with hands and feet planted while lengthening through the spine and hamstrings.
Fold forward from a wide or narrow stance and hold the stretch through the backs of the legs.
Lower into a lunge, hold the bottom, then add small pulses before switching sides.
Hold a wide turned-out squat and lean side to side to deepen the inner-thigh and hip stretch.
Hover on hands and toes with knees off the floor, then pulse one lifted leg at a time.
From a hovering hands-and-knees position, draw one knee up along your side toward the shoulder and repeat.
Balance on one leg while hinging forward and reaching your arms out in front, then switch sides.
Stand tall, pull one knee into your chest, hold briefly, and switch sides.
Stand tall, draw one knee out to the side with same-side arm support, and hold before switching.
Stay low in a squat and press your knees outward to open the hips and inner thighs.
Jump from feet-together to a low wide stance while reaching one hand toward the floor and alternating sides.
Sprint in place, drop into alternating lunge hops, then return to the sprint rhythm.
Throw hooks to the front and then mimic a quick jump-rope bounce before switching sides.
Drop to plank, complete push-ups and floor sprints, jump back in, and stand tall before repeating.
Hop continuously while switching one foot forward and one back, pumping the arms in sync.
Run lightly in place with quick relaxed steps to raise your heart rate.
Run in place while driving knees up and twisting your torso toward each lift.
Mimic fast rope jumps with quick light bounces on the balls of your feet.
Jump upward from a wider stance and pull your knees up before landing softly.
Hold a C-sit and rotate your torso left and right with hands together in front of your chest.
Rotate in a C-sit and lift the same-side knee toward your torso on each twist.
In a C-sit, sweep your hands from overhead down to each side in an A-shaped pattern.
Perform the A-frame arm pattern in a C-sit while lifting the matching knee each rep.
Hold a C-sit position with your hands centered in front of your chest and core braced.
In a supported C-sit, pull one leg in and out and then raise and lower it before switching sides.
In a supported C-sit, move both legs together by drawing them in and out and then lifting them up and down.
From high plank, alternate driving each knee toward the same-side shoulder.
From forearm plank, alternate drawing each knee toward the same-side shoulder with control.
From low plank and then high plank, tuck your hips under in short controlled pulses.
Alternate eight switch kicks with eight low hop squats in a repeating combo.
Jump straight up as high as you can with feet together and soft landings.
Travel sideways in a high plank by stepping hands and feet together across the floor.
Throw elbow strikes from standing and then drop into a short set of side-to-side suicide drills.
Hop four times on one leg with the other knee lifted, then switch sides and repeat.
Throw quick jabs from a squat, then jump and turn to repeat facing the other direction.
Lift one knee, tap the toe, pulse the knee up, and extend the leg before switching sides.
exercises.muscles: Hip flexors; abs; quads; balance muscles

exercises.description: Hold a plie squat while pulsing, sweeping, lifting, and circling straight arms through several patterns.
